// Safe Space

YOU ARE
WELCOME
HERE

This is an explicitly LGBT+ affirming space. Whether you're queer, trans, nonbinary, questioning, or an ally — you belong here and you will never be judged for who you are or who you love.

Your pronouns are respected. Your identity is valid. Your story matters.

🏳️‍🌈
LGBT+ Affirming
All sexual orientations and gender identities are celebrated and respected here.
🤝
Pronouns Respected
Tell me your pronouns when you book. They will always be used, no questions asked.
🔒
Your Privacy
What you share about your identity or relationships stays completely confidential.
💜
No Judgment
Come exactly as you are. There is no version of you that is too much or not enough.

// What's Available

CHOOSE YOUR
SESSION TYPE

01
Phone Call
Talk from wherever you are. No commute, no setup. Just call in and let it out.
02

See each other, feel the presence. More personal than a call — from the comfort of your own space.
03
Anonymous
No name required. Show up as whoever you need to be. Your privacy is respected completely.
100% Real Human
// Who You're Talking To

REAL TALK,
REAL PERSON

I'm not a therapist — and I'm not pretending to be. What I am is someone who genuinely cares, knows how to listen without making it about themselves, and won't judge you for anything you're going through.

Sometimes you just need to say the thing out loud. To someone who isn't in your circle, doesn't have an agenda, and gives you their full attention. That's exactly what this is.

This is an LGBT+ affirming space. Your identity, your pronouns, your story — all of it is welcome here without reservation.

// Plans

MONTHLY &
YEARLY PLANS

All plans are paid upfront in full — no payment plans. Once payment is received, you email your preferred dates to lock them in.

All sessions are 60-minute phone calls. Want video chat instead? Add $150 to any plan.

⚠ Payment Policy
These plans must be paid in full before your first session. No exceptions, no installments. After payment, email deebookclub25@gmail.com with your preferred dates and we'll get you locked in.
📞 Monthly Plans
STARTER
$149/mo

2 calls every week. That's 8 sessions total each month. Perfect if you want regular check-ins without going all in.

8 SESSIONS / MONTH · 60 MIN EACH
PAID UPFRONT · EMAIL TO LOCK IN DATES
Most Popular
PLUS
$269/mo

4 calls every week. That's 16 sessions total each month. Best for people who want to talk it out consistently and stay on top of things.

16 SESSIONS / MONTH · 60 MIN EACH
PAID UPFRONT · EMAIL TO LOCK IN DATES
📅 Yearly Plans — Best Value
ESSENTIAL
$299/yr

3 calls every month, all year long. That's 36 sessions total. You lock in your spot and save big compared to paying each time.

36 SESSIONS / YEAR · 60 MIN EACH
PAID UPFRONT · EMAIL TO LOCK IN DATES
Best Value
STANDARD
$379/yr

4 calls every month, all year long. That's 48 sessions total. A little more support, locked in at one low price.

48 SESSIONS / YEAR · 60 MIN EACH
PAID UPFRONT · EMAIL TO LOCK IN DATES
PREMIUM
$529/yr

6 calls every month, all year long. That's 72 sessions total. The most access, the best value — for people who are serious about showing up for themselves.

72 SESSIONS / YEAR · 60 MIN EACH
PAID UPFRONT · EMAIL TO LOCK IN DATES
🎥 Want Video Chat?
Upgrade any plan to video chat sessions by adding $150 to the plan price. Just mention it when you email your dates.
⚠ Important Notice
Real Talk Sessions is a peer listening and advice service — not a licensed therapy or mental health practice. The person you speak with is not a licensed therapist, counselor, psychologist, or medical professional. Sessions are not a substitute for professional mental health treatment. If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, thoughts of self-harm, or require clinical support, please contact a licensed professional or call/text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) immediately.
THE EASIEST WAY TO GET STARTED? BOOK RIGHT HERE.
No back-and-forth. No waiting. Pick your time and you're set.
